creator: deischen@iworks.InterWorks.org
text:
I modified the GNAT port to work for recent changes in
FreeBSDs libc_r.  These changes were introduced into
3.0-current around 11/25/97, before GNAT-3.10p was first
submitted.  Please disregard the diffs posted in the
previous port upgrade request and use this diff.

Thanks,

Dan Eischen
deischen@iworks.InterWorks.org

begin 664 gnat.diffs.gz
